creator: george@m5p.com
text: SCHED_ULE is totally befuddled by misc/dnetc and will give it almost all compute cycles available, even at nice 20, screwing interactive processes like you wouldn't believe.  SCHED_4BSD does considerably better, allowing a "make buildworld" to complete in 25819 seconds rather than 56185 (13.3-RELEASE-p4).  Patch given updates the install message to give the user a clue.
